summary.es: Akali recibe buff de armadura y daño
summary.en: Akali receives armor and damage buff

detail.es: Armadura base: 30→34. Five Point Strike daño: 30/65/100/135→35/70/105/140.
detail.en: Base armor: 30→34. Five Point Strike damage: 30/65/100/135→35/70/105/140.

summary.es: Darius: sangrado aumentado, daño a monstruos reducido
summary.en: Darius: bleed increased, monster damage reduced

detail.es: Hemorrhage sangrado: 11.5-31→14.5-34. Daño a monstruos: 200%→150%.
detail.en: Hemorrhage bleed: 11.5-31→14.5-34. Monster damage: 200%→150%.

summary.es: Ezreal buffed: más AD, AS y daño de habilidades
summary.en: Ezreal buffed: more AD, AS and ability damage

detail.en: AD per level: 3.6→4. Attack speed: 20%→30%. Mystic Shot: 30/65/100/135→35/70/105/140. Trueshot CD: 70/70/70s→70/65/60s.

summary.es: Hero's Entrance de Galio con CD reducido
summary.en: Galio Hero's Entrance cooldown reduced

detail.es: Cooldown Hero's Entrance: 110/100/90s→100/90/80s.
detail.en: Hero's Entrance cooldown: 110/100/90s→100/90/80s.

summary.es: Gragas: Body Slam con CD mínimo
summary.en: Gragas: Body Slam with minimum cooldown

detail.es: Body Slam: nuevo CD mínimo de 1.25s.
detail.en: Body Slam: new minimum cooldown of 1.25s.

summary.es: Graves: más daño crítico en New Destiny
summary.en: Graves: more crit damage from New Destiny

detail.es: New Destiny daño crítico: 120%→130%. Con IE: 130%→140%.
detail.en: New Destiny crit damage: 120%→130%. With IE: 130%→140%.

summary.es: Jhin nerfado: menos AD bonus y daño de Dancing Grenade
summary.en: Jhin nerfed: less bonus AD and Dancing Grenade damage

detail.es: Whisper bonus AD: 5%→4%. Ratio de MS: 10%→15%. Dancing Grenade: 40/50/60/70%→35/45/55/65%.
detail.en: Whisper AD bonus: 5%→4%. Movement speed ratio: 10%→15%. Dancing Grenade: 40/50/60/70%→35/45/55/65%.

summary.es: Kai'Sa nerfada: menos AS y daño de habilidades
summary.en: Kai'Sa nerfed: less AS and ability damage

detail.es: Attack speed: 30%→20%. Icathian Rain daño a monstruos: nuevo 50%. Void Seeker AD: 130%→110%, AP: 70%→60%.
detail.en: Attack speed: 30%→20%. Icathian Rain monster damage: new 50%. Void Seeker AD: 130%→110%, AP: 70%→60%.

summary.es: Kayn buff en Shadow Assassin: energía y daño
summary.en: Kayn buff in Shadow Assassin: energy and damage

detail.es: Shadow Assassin energía necesaria: 8000→7000. Daño a distancia energía: 18→24. Energía por kill a distancia: 90→120. Bonus daño: 38-52%→44-56%. Blade's Reach AD: 120%→130%. Shadow Step maná: 80→50, AD: 40%→50%.
detail.en: Shadow Assassin energy needed: 8000→7000. Ranged damage energy: 18→24. Ranged kill energy: 90→120. Bonus damage: 38-52%→44-56%. Blade's Reach AD: 120%→130%. Shadow Step mana: 80→50, AD: 40%→50%.

summary.es: Kha'Zix: Taste Their Fear con más daño
summary.en: Kha'Zix: Taste Their Fear more damage

summary.es: Master Yi: más AD base y Alpha Strike más rápido
summary.en: Master Yi: more base AD and Alpha Strike faster

detail.en: Base AD: 52→54. Alpha Strike cooldown: 17/16/15/14s→16/15/14/13s.

summary.es: Miss Fortune: más AD base y Love Tap
summary.en: Miss Fortune: more base AD and Love Tap

summary.es: Pantheon: más maná, daño y retorno de CD
summary.en: Pantheon: more mana, damage and CD return

detail.es: Maná: 390→420. Maná regen: 9→12. Comet Spear AD: 110%→120%. Grand Starfall AD: 110%→120%. Retorno CD: 50%→60%.
detail.en: Mana: 390→420. Mana regen: 9→12. Comet Spear AD: 110%→120%. Grand Starfall AD: 110%→120%. Cooldown return: 50%→60%.

summary.es: Pyke: más resistencias y daño de habilidades
summary.en: Pyke: more resistances and ability damage

detail.es: Armadura por nivel: 4.3→5. MR por nivel: 1.6→2.5. Bone Skewer: 110/175/240/305→120/185/250/315. Death From Below: 250/375/500→250/400/550.

summary.es: Sett: golpe derecho mejorado a nivel más alto
summary.en: Sett: right punch upgraded at higher level

detail.es: Pit Grit golpe derecho: Nivel 5→Nivel 7 bonus. Haymaker consumo de Grit: (25%+0.2%)→(25%+0.25%).
detail.en: Pit Grit right punch: Level 5→Level 7 bonus. Haymaker Grit consumption: (25%+0.2%)→(25%+0.25%).

summary.es: Twitch nerfado: menos daño a monstruos
summary.en: Twitch nerfed: less monster damage

detail.es: Deadly Venom daño a monstruos: 170%→130%. Ambush MS: 30%→20%. Contaminate daño a monstruos: 170%→130%.
detail.en: Deadly Venom monster damage: 170%→130%. Ambush movement speed: 30%→20%. Contaminate monster damage: 170%→130%.

summary.es: Urgot: más daño en Purge y Fear Beyond Death
summary.en: Urgot: more damage in Purge and Fear Beyond Death

detail.es: Purge on-hit ratio: 50%→70%. Fear Beyond Death AD ratio: 50%→70%.
detail.en: Purge on-hit ratio: 50%→70%. Fear Beyond Death AD ratio: 50%→70%.

summary.es: Varus: Blighted Quiver nerfado
summary.en: Varus: Blighted Quiver nerfed

detail.es: Blighted Quiver detonación: (4.5/5/5.5/6%+0.02%AP)→(4/4.5/5/5.5%+0.01%AP) vida máxima.
detail.en: Blighted Quiver detonation: (4.5/5/5.5/6%+0.02%AP)→(4/4.5/5/5.5%+0.01%AP) max health.

summary.es: Vayne: más velocidad de ataque
summary.en: Vayne: more attack speed

detail.es: Attack speed: 20%→30%. AS por nivel: 2.2%→3.2%.
detail.en: Attack speed: 20%→30%. AS per level: 2.2%→3.2%.

summary.es: Yone nerfado: menos AS y daño a monstruos
summary.en: Yone nerfed: less AS and monster damage

detail.es: Attack speed: 30%→20%. Spirit Cleave daño a monstruos: 80-290→30-280.
detail.en: Attack speed: 30%→20%. Spirit Cleave monster damage: 80-290→30-280.

summary.es: Bloodthirster: más AD, menos vamp físico
summary.en: Bloodthirster: more AD, less physical vamp

detail.es: AD: 50→55. Physical vamp: 15%→12%.
detail.en: AD: 50→55. Physical vamp: 15%→12%.

summary.es: Immortal Shieldbow nerfado: escudo y vamp reducidos
summary.en: Immortal Shieldbow nerfed: shield and vamp reduced

detail.es: Escudo: 200+5 por 1% crit→200+3 por 1% crit. Physical vamp: 10%→5%.
detail.en: Shield: 200+5 per 1% crit→200+3 per 1% crit. Physical vamp: 10%→5%.

summary.es: Phantom Dancer: más caro y menos AS
summary.en: Phantom Dancer: more expensive and less AS

detail.es: Coste: 2900g→3000g. Attack speed: 30%→25%.
detail.en: Cost: 2900g→3000g. Attack speed: 30%→25%.
